camgeo-cam-rot.q_en:
The camera records a series of images from a first-person perspective. Identify the deliberate camera rotation, ignoring small shakes. 'Pan' is horizontal (left/right) rotation, 'Tilt' is vertical (up/down) rotation, and 'Roll' is spinning around the forward axis. Considering rotation around the forward-facing axis, does the camera roll clockwise or counterclockwise from image-1 to image-2? Options:
A. rolling counterclockwise
B. rolling clockwise
Please try to answer the question with short words or phrases if possible.
camgeo-cam-rot.q_zh:
摄像机以第一人称视角记录了一系列图像。请识别刻意的相机旋转，忽略微小的抖动。“水平转动（Pan）”是水平（左/右）旋转，“垂直转动（Tilt）”是垂直（上/下）旋转，“翻滚（Roll）”是绕前向轴的旋转。考虑到绕前向轴的旋转，从图像-1到图像-2，相机是顺时针翻滚还是逆时针翻滚？选项：
A. 逆时针翻滚
B. 顺时针翻滚
请尽量使用简短的词汇或短语回答问题。

camgeo-cam-rot.q_en:
The camera records a series of images from a first-person perspective. Identify the deliberate camera rotation, ignoring small shakes. 'Pan' is horizontal (left/right) rotation, 'Tilt' is vertical (up/down) rotation, and 'Roll' is spinning around the forward axis. When focusing on the camera's horizontal rotation, does it pan to the left or right from image-1 to image-2? Options: A. panning to the left, B. panning to the right
Please select the correct answer from the options above.
camgeo-cam-rot.q_zh: 相机以第一人称视角记录了一系列图像。请识别相机刻意的旋转，忽略微小的抖动。“水平转动 (Pan)”是水平（左/右）旋转，“垂直转动 (Tilt)”是垂直（上/下）旋转，“翻滚 (Roll)”是绕前进轴旋转。当关注相机的水平旋转时，从图像-1到图像-2，它是向左还是向右水平转动？选项：A. 向左水平转动，B. 向右水平转动。请从以上选项中选择正确答案。

camgeo-cam-rot.q_en:
The camera records a series of images from a first-person perspective. Identify the deliberate camera rotation, ignoring small shakes. 'Pan' is horizontal (left/right) rotation, 'Tilt' is vertical (up/down) rotation, and 'Roll' is spinning around the forward axis. Considering only vertical rotation, does the camera tilt upward or downward from image-1 to image-2? Options: A. tilting upward, B. tilting downward
Please select the correct answer from the options above.
camgeo-cam-rot.q_zh: 摄像机以第一人称视角记录了一系列图像。请识别刻意的相机旋转，忽略微小的抖动。“水平转动 (Pan)”是水平（左/右）旋转，“垂直俯仰 (Tilt)”是垂直（上/下）旋转，“翻滚 (Roll)”是绕前进轴旋转。仅考虑垂直旋转，相机从图像-1到图像-2是向上俯仰还是向下俯仰？选项：A. 向上俯仰，B. 向下俯仰。请从上述选项中选择正确答案。

camgeo-cam-rot.q_en:
The camera records a series of images from a first-person perspective. Identify the deliberate camera rotation, ignoring small shakes. 'Pan' is horizontal (left/right) rotation, 'Tilt' is vertical (up/down) rotation, and 'Roll' is spinning around the forward axis. Considering rotation around the forward-facing axis, does the camera roll clockwise or counterclockwise from image-1 to image-2? Options:
A. rolling counterclockwise
B. rolling clockwise
Please try to answer the question with short words or phrases if possible.
camgeo-cam-rot.q_zh:
摄像机以第一人称视角记录了一系列图像。请识别刻意的相机旋转，忽略微小的抖动。“水平转动（Pan）”是水平（左/右）旋转，“垂直转动（Tilt）”是垂直（上/下）旋转，“翻滚（Roll）”是绕前向轴的旋转。考虑到绕前向轴的旋转，从图像-1到图像-2，相机是顺时针翻滚还是逆时针翻滚？选项：
A. 逆时针翻滚
B. 顺时针翻滚
请尽量使用简短的词汇或短语回答问题。

camgeo-cam-trans.q_en:
Images are acquired in a continuous stream from a first-person perspective. How does the camera's location change through space? Options:
A. forward and leftward
B. backward
C. backward and leftward
D. forward and rightward
Please select the correct answer from the options above.
camgeo-cam-trans.q_zh:
图像是以第一人称视角连续采集的。摄像机在空间中的位置是如何变化的？选项：
A. 向前并向左
B. 向后
C. 向后并向左
D. 向前并向右
请从以上选项中选择正确答案。

camgeo-cam-trans.q_en:
Each frame is taken in turn, providing a continuous first-person perspective. The objective is to recognize the primary movement direction of the camera, ignoring slight jitters. Which way does the camera's position move? Options: A. rightward, B. leftward
Please try to answer the question with short words or phrases if possible.
camgeo-cam-trans.q_zh: 每一帧按顺序拍摄，提供连续的第一人称视角。目标是识别摄像机的主要移动方向，忽略轻微的抖动。摄像机的位置向哪个方向移动？选项：A. 向右，B. 向左。如果可能，请尝试用简短的词语或短语回答问题。

camgeo-cam-trans.q_en:
Each frame is taken in turn, providing a continuous first-person perspective. How does the camera's location change through space? Options:
A. rightward and upward
B. backward and leftward
C. rightward and downward
D. backward
Answer the question using a single word or phrase.
camgeo-cam-trans.q_zh:
每一帧按顺序拍摄，提供连续的第一人称视角。摄像机的位置在空间中是如何变化的？选项：
A. 向右且向上
B. 向后且向左
C. 向右且向下
D. 向后
请用一个单词或短语回答问题。

camgeo-cam-trans.q_en:
The images are taken continuously from a first-person perspective. How does the camera's location change through space? Options:
A. backward and leftward
B. upward
C. backward and rightward
D. rightward and downward
Answer the question using a single word or phrase.
camgeo-cam-trans.q_zh:
这些图像是以第一人称视角连续拍摄的。摄像机在空间中的位置是如何变化的？选项：
A. 向后并向左
B. 向上
C. 向后并向右
D. 向右并向下
请用一个单词或短语回答问题。

camgeo-cam-view-direction.q_en:
Images are acquired in a continuous stream from a first-person perspective. Assuming the second shot was taken facing northwest, what is the camera's facing direction for the first shot? Options: A. southwest, B. it cannot be determined, C. west, D. northeast
Please try to answer the question with short words or phrases if possible.
camgeo-cam-view-direction.q_zh: 图像是以第一人称视角连续采集的。假设第二张照片是面向西北方向拍摄的，第一张照片拍摄时相机的朝向是什么？选项：A. 西南，B. 无法确定，C. 正西，D. 东北。请尽量使用简短的词汇或短语回答问题。

camgeo-cam-view-direction.q_en:
Each frame is taken in turn, providing a continuous first-person perspective. Assuming the first shot was taken facing north, what is the camera's facing direction for the second shot? Options:
A. northeast
B. north
C. the result cannot be determined
D. south
Please try to answer the question with short words or phrases if possible.
camgeo-cam-view-direction.q_zh:
每一帧都是按顺序拍摄的，提供连续的第一人称视角。假设第一张照片是朝北拍摄的，那么第二张照片中相机的朝向是什么？选项：
A. 东北
B. 北
C. 无法确定结果
D. 南
如果可能，请尝试用简短的词或短语回答问题。

camgeo-cam-view-direction.q_en:
Each frame is taken in turn, providing a continuous first-person perspective. Assuming the second shot was taken facing southeast, what is the camera's facing direction for the first shot? Options:
A. cannot say for sure
B. southeast
C. southwest
D. east
Please select the correct answer from the options above.
camgeo-cam-view-direction.q_zh:
每一帧都是按顺序拍摄的，提供了一个连续的第一人称视角。假设第二张照片是面向东南方向拍摄的，第一张照片中相机的朝向是什么？选项：
A. 无法确定
B. 东南
C. 西南
D. 东
请从以上选项中选择正确答案。

camgeo-cam-view-direction.q_en:
Each frame is taken in turn, providing a continuous first-person perspective. Assuming the first shot was taken facing south, what is the camera's facing direction for the second shot? Options:
A. north
B. southwest
C. it cannot be determined
D. south
Answer the question using a single word or phrase.
camgeo-cam-view-direction.q_zh:
每一帧都是按顺序拍摄的，提供了连续的第一人称视角。假设第一张照片是朝南拍摄的，那么第二张照片中相机的朝向是什么？选项：
A. 北
B. 西南
C. 无法确定
D. 南
请用一个词或短语回答问题。

camgeo-cam-position.q_en:
Images are acquired in a continuous stream from a first-person perspective. If the first photo was taken from my spot, where is the second camera relative to that? Options:
A. front
B. uncertain
C. right
D. back left
Answer the question using a single word or phrase.
camgeo-cam-position.q_zh:
图像是以第一人称视角连续采集的。如果第一张照片是在我所在的位置拍摄的，那么第二台相机相对于那个位置在哪里？选项：
A. 前方
B. 不确定
C. 右方
D. 左后方
请用一个词或短语回答问题。

camgeo-cam-position.q_en:
Each frame is taken in turn, providing a continuous first-person perspective. If the first photo was taken from my spot, where is the second camera relative to that? Options:
A. right
B. back left
C. front
D. cannot say for sure
Answer the question using a single word or phrase.
camgeo-cam-position.q_zh:
每一帧都是按顺序拍摄的，提供了连续的第一人称视角。如果第一张照片是在我的位置拍摄的，那么第二台相机相对于那个位置在哪里？选项：
A. 右侧
B. 左后方
C. 前方
D. 无法确定
请用一个词或短语回答问题。

camgeo-cam-position.q_en:
The images are taken continuously from a first-person perspective. If the first photo was taken from my spot, where is the second camera relative to that? Options:
A. back

camgeo-cam-position.q_zh:

A. 后方
B. 无法确定
C. 左前方
D. 右后方

camgeo-cam-position.q_en:
The images are taken continuously from a first-person perspective. If the first photo was taken from my spot, where is the second camera relative to that? Options:
A. back right

Answer the question using a single word or phrase.
camgeo-cam-position.q_zh:
这些图像是以第一人称视角连续拍摄的。如果第一张照片是在我当前的位置拍摄的，那么第二台相机相对于该位置在什么方向？选项：
A. 右后方
B. 右侧
C. 左前方
D. 无法确定
请使用单词或短语回答。

camgeo-correspondence.q_en:
A point is highlighted with a blue circle (marked 'REF') in image one. After adjusting the camera, image two presents multiple blue-circled points labeled 'A, B, C, D'. Which matches the original point?
A point-A
B point-B
C point-C
D point-D
camgeo-correspondence.q_zh:
图 1 中用蓝色圆圈（标记为“REF”）标出了一个点。在调整相机视角后，图 2 显示了多个标有“A、B、C、D”的蓝色圆圈点。请问哪一个点与原始点相匹配？
A 点-A
B 点-B
C 点-C
D 点-D

camgeo-correspondence.q_en:
A point is highlighted with a cyan circle (marked 'REF') in image one. After adjusting the camera, image two presents multiple cyan-circled points labeled 'A, B, C, D'. Which matches the original point?
A point-A
B point-B
C point-C
D point-D
camgeo-correspondence.q_zh:
图一中有一个用青色圆圈（标记为“REF”）标出的点。在调整相机视角后，图二显示了多个标有“A、B、C、D”的青色圆圈点。哪一个点与原始点相匹配？

camgeo-correspondence.q_zh:

A 点-A
B 点-B
C 点-C
D 点-D

multiimgcamgeo-b1.q_en:
A camera moves through the room and takes three shots in sequence (view-1, then view-2, then view-3). Order the three camera positions along the back-to-front axis of the room, from the back-most to the front-most. Options:
A. view-1 -> view-2 -> view-3
B. view-3 -> view-2 -> view-1
C. view-2 -> view-3 -> view-1
D. view-3 -> view-1 -> view-2
Please select the correct answer from the options above.
multiimgcamgeo-b1.q_zh:
一个摄像头在房间内移动，并依次拍摄了三张照片（视角-1，接着是视角-2，然后是视角-3）。请沿着房间的后向到前向轴，将这三个摄像头的位置按从最靠后到最靠前的顺序排列。选项：
A. 视角-1 -> 视角-2 -> 视角-3
B. 视角-3 -> 视角-2 -> 视角-1
C. 视角-2 -> 视角-3 -> 视角-1
D. 视角-3 -> 视角-1 -> 视角-2
请从上述选项中选择正确答案。

multiimgcamgeo-b1.q_en:
Three images are captured in order (view-1, view-2, view-3) from a moving first-person camera. Combining both turns, what is the net change in the direction the camera is facing from view-1 to view-3 (ignore small jitter)? Options: A. about 30 degrees to the left (counter-clockwise), B. about 15 degrees to the left (counter-clockwise), C. about 75 degrees to the right (clockwise), D. about 45 degrees to the left (counter-clockwise)
Please try to answer the question with short words or phrases if possible.
multiimgcamgeo-b1.a_en: A. about 30 degrees to the left (counter-clockwise)
multiimgcamgeo-b1.q_zh: 一个移动的第一人称相机按顺序拍摄了三张图像（视角-1、视角-2、视角-3）。结合两次转向，从视角-1到视角-3，相机朝向的净变化是多少（忽略微小抖动）？选项：A. 向左（逆时针）约 30 度，B. 向左（逆时针）约 15 度，C. 向右（顺时针）约 75 度，D. 向左（逆时针）约 45 度。请尽量使用简短的词汇或短语回答问题。
multiimgcamgeo-b1.a_zh: A. 向左（逆时针）约 30 度

multiimgcamgeo-b1.q_en:
Three images are captured in order (view-1, view-2, view-3) from a moving first-person camera. Combining both turns, what is the net change in the direction the camera is facing from view-1 to view-3 (ignore small jitter)? Options: A. about 15 degrees to the left (counter-clockwise), B. about 15 degrees to the right (clockwise), C. about 90 degrees to the right (clockwise), D. about 30 degrees to the left (counter-clockwise)
Please try to answer the question with short words or phrases if possible.
multiimgcamgeo-b1.a_en: D. about 30 degrees to the left (counter-clockwise)
multiimgcamgeo-b1.q_zh: 从移动的第一人称视角相机按顺序拍摄了三张图像（视角-1、视角-2、视角-3）。结合两次转向，从视角-1到视角-3，相机朝向的净变化是多少（忽略微小抖动）？选项：A. 向左（逆时针）约 15 度，B. 向右（顺时针）约 15 度，C. 向右（顺时针）约 90 度，D. 向左（逆时针）约 30 度。请尽可能使用简短的词汇或短语回答问题。
multiimgcamgeo-b1.a_zh: D. 向左（逆时针）约 30 度

multiimgcamgeo-b1.q_en:
The three images below are frames taken one after another (view-1, view-2, view-3) from a single moving camera. Imagine standing at the view-2 camera and looking toward the view-3 camera. Relative to that line of sight, where is the view-1 camera? Options:
A. directly on the line between them
B. on the left side
C. on the right side
Please try to answer the question with short words or phrases if possible.
multiimgcamgeo-b1.q_zh:
下面三张图像是由单个移动摄像机依次拍摄的帧（视角-1、视角-2、视角-3）。想象你站在视角-2摄像机的位置，并朝向视角-3摄像机的方向看。相对于这条视线，视角-1摄像机位于什么位置？选项：
A. 直接位于两者之间的连线上
B. 在左侧
C. 在右侧
请尽量用简短的词汇或短语回答问题。

A. rightward

A. 向右
B. 向左

Images are acquired in a continuous stream from a first-person perspective. If the first photo was taken from my spot, where is the second camera relative to that? Options:
A. it cannot be determined

C. back
D. front right
Please select the correct answer from the options above.
videocamgeo-b2.q_zh:

videocamgeo-b2.q_en:

When focusing on the camera's horizontal rotation, does it pan to the left or right from image-1 to image-2? Options:

A. 向左转动

videocamgeo-b2.q_en:

'Pan' is horizontal (left/right) rotation, 'Tilt' is vertical (up/down) rotation, and 'Roll' is spinning around the forward axis. When focusing on the camera's horizontal rotation, does it pan to the left or right from image-1 to image-2? Options:

videocamgeo-b2.q_zh:
摄像机以第一人称视角记录了一系列图像。请识别出相机刻意的旋转，忽略微小的抖动。“水平转动 (Pan)”是水平方向（左/右）的旋转，“垂直转动 (Tilt)”是垂直方向（上/下）的旋转，“翻滚 (Roll)”是绕前进轴的旋转。当关注相机的水平旋转时，从图像-1到图像-2，它是向左还是向右水平转动？选项：

B. 向右水平转动

objtask-obj-orientation.q_en:
Given that laptop (in frame 1) is northwest of table (in frame 2), what is the direction of window (in frame 1) relative to table (in frame 2)? Options:
A. northwest
B. north
C. northeast
D. west

taskonomy-mi-v1.q_zh: 每一帧都是按顺序拍摄的，提供连续的第一人称视角。如果第一张照片是在我的位置拍摄的，那么第二台相机相对于那个位置在哪里？选项：A. 前方，B. 右方，C. 左前方，D. 无法确定结果。请尽量用简短的词汇或短语回答问题。

taskonomy-mi-v1.q_en:

A point-A

A 点-A
B 点-B

megadepth-mi-v1.q_en:
The camera records a series of images from a first-person perspective. Identify the deliberate camera rotation, ignoring small shakes. 'Pan' is horizontal (left/right) rotation, 'Tilt' is vertical (up/down) rotation, and 'Roll' is spinning around the forward axis. Considering only vertical rotation, does the camera tilt upward or downward from image-1 to image-2? Options: A. tilting upward, B. tilting downward
Answer the question using a single word or phrase.
megadepth-mi-v1.q_zh: 摄像机以第一人称视角记录了一系列图像。请识别有意的摄像机旋转，忽略微小的抖动。“水平转动（Pan）”是水平（左/右）旋转，“俯仰（Tilt）”是垂直（上/下）旋转，“翻滚（Roll）”是绕前进轴的旋转。仅考虑垂直旋转，摄像机从图像-1到图像-2是向上俯仰还是向下俯仰？选项：A. 向上俯仰，B. 向下俯仰。请用一个词或短语回答问题。

megadepth-mi-v1.q_en:
The images are taken continuously from a first-person perspective. How does the camera's location change through space? Options:
A. leftward and downward
B. forward
C. backward
D. forward and rightward
Answer the question using a single word or phrase.
megadepth-mi-v1.q_zh:
这些图像是从第一人称视角连续拍摄的。摄像机在空间中的位置是如何变化的？选项：
A. 向左并向下
B. 向前
C. 向后
D. 向前并向右
请用一个单词或短语回答问题。

megadepth-mi-v1.q_en:
The camera records a series of images from a first-person perspective. Identify the deliberate camera rotation, ignoring small shakes. 'Pan' is horizontal (left/right) rotation, 'Tilt' is vertical (up/down) rotation, and 'Roll' is spinning around the forward axis. When focusing on the camera's horizontal rotation, does it pan to the left or right from image-1 to image-2? Options: A. panning to the left, B. panning to the right
Please try to answer the question with short words or phrases if possible.
megadepth-mi-v1.q_zh: 摄像机以第一人称视角记录了一系列图像。请识别摄像机刻意的旋转动作，忽略微小的抖动。“水平转动（Pan）”是水平方向（左/右）的旋转，“俯仰（Tilt）”是垂直方向（上/下）的旋转，“翻滚（Roll）”是绕着向前轴的旋转。关注摄像机的水平旋转，从图像-1到图像-2，它是向左还是向右转动？选项：A. 向左转动，B. 向右转动。请尽量使用简短的词汇或短语回答问题。

megadepth-mi-v1.q_en:
Images are acquired in a continuous stream from a first-person perspective. If the camera faced 9 o'clock direction when the first picture was taken, what is its direction for the second picture? Options: A. 9 o'clock, B. cannot say for sure, C. 11 o'clock, D. 8 o'clock
Answer the question using a single word or phrase.
megadepth-mi-v1.q_zh: 图像是以第一人称视角连续采集的。如果拍摄第一张照片时相机面向 9 点钟方向，那么拍摄第二张照片时它的方向是什么？选项：A. 9 点钟，B. 无法确定，C. 11 点钟，D. 8 点钟。请用一个词或短语回答问题。

Please select the correct answer from the options above.
waymo-outdoor-mi-v1.q_zh: 这两张图像是由同一台经过标定的前置摄像头按顺序拍摄的。从第一个相机位置到第二个相机位置，相机位移的主要方向是什么？选项：A. 向后且向左，B. 向前，C. 向左且向下，D. 向右且向上。请从以上选项中选择正确答案。
